Metadata.Goal: Make the control plane's encapsulation and command/message boundaries executable contracts, with minimal refactor of the three control logic clusters.
Metadata.Description: 定义控制面 Logic Component boundary declaration、sync_command/async_message 分类与 coordinator/writer 分离契约，为 OrchestratorDriver、RuntimeControlEngine、SnapshotCoordinator 三个集群声明边界并做通过 conformance 所需的最小重构。

TaskGroup.name: Boundary Declaration Contract
TaskGroup.Description: 定义控制面 logic component boundary declaration 与入口分类契约。

Task.name: Add failing tests for boundary declaration contract
Task.Description: 新增 boundary declaration shape、sync_command/async_message 分类与 forbiddenDirectIo 声明的失败测试。

Task.name: Implement control boundary declaration types
Task.Description: 按 decisions.md 问题 1 确认的宿主实现通用类型与注册（含分类查询 helper）。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 类型可被 AI 控制面集群声明复用，且与 DataSubgraphContract 分层一致。

TaskGroup.name: Cluster Boundary Declarations
TaskGroup.Description: 为三个控制面集群声明边界，并验证声明与源码一致。

Task.name: Declare boundaries for the three control clusters
Task.Description: 为 OrchestratorDriverLogic、RuntimeControlEngineLogic、SnapshotCoordinatorLogic 写 boundary declaration（core logic 入口、effect contracts、入口分类、forbiddenDirectIo）。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 三个集群均有完整声明，coreLogicEntries 指向真实源码符号。

Task.name: Add encapsulation conformance and fix violations minimally
Task.Description: 源码级断言 coreLogicEntries 不含 forbiddenDirectIo；复用 depa-processor adapter 的要求可断言；conformance 暴露的违反点做最小修复（修复前后用既有失败基线对照，不允许新增失败）。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 封装 conformance 全绿且无新增测试失败。

TaskGroup.name: Command-Message And Coordinator Conformance
TaskGroup.Description: 固化 command/message 边界与 coordinator/writer 分离的 conformance cases。

Task.name: Add command-message boundary conformance cases
Task.Description: 正向：跨 actor 唤醒（childDone/tool result/human input）经 mailbox；同步推进经公开 reducer。负向：直接修改内部字段、绕过 mailbox 的入口被声明禁止。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: conformance 覆盖 sync-reducer-input-is-command、cross-actor-unblock-is-message、boundary-classification-is-declared 三个 spec case。

Task.name: Add coordinator-writer and engine-effect conformance cases
Task.Description: 非 safepoint 时 writer 只返回结构化跳过、不调度；coordinator 在 orchestration 边界决定推进或跳过；engine 副作用经注入 effect contract 执行并留证据，core reducer 无 IO。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: conformance 覆盖 snapshot-writer-does-not-schedule、coordinator-decides-at-boundary、engine-effects-via-contract 三个 spec case。
